textContent: Masaya naman! Super pagod kasi oml ambilis ni Andrei maglakad tapos yung naka-black naming kaklase so I was like omg my binti HAHAHAHA. Lagi din nahuhulog yung shorts ko so everyone were seeing my shorts omfg buti tinaas ni zeph HAAHAHA. Super init tho that day so ang init-init na nga, my water bottle was like hot and all (kasi wala na yung aquaflask ko RIP), tapos ang sakit-sakit pa ng binti ko.
